package rulecoverage

func PositiveServiceImportsGinDirectly() string {
    ruleID := "service_imports_gin_directly"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Service packages that depend on `github.com/gin-gonic/gin` instead of transport-neutral inputs."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
